scripts.start:dev: concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run sessions" "npm run mobile"
scripts.backend:mac: cd chatnalyxer-backend && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn app.main:app --reload
scripts.install:all: cd chatnalyxer-backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../user-whatsapp-sessions && npm install && cd ../chatnalyxer-mobile && npm install
